user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Heineken
Product type: Silver premium lager
Tone: refreshing, modern, premium
Visual style: Clean, sleek visuals with a bright silver palette emphasizing clarity and sophistication.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Sip into the Silver Lining
brief.caption: A pristine glass of frosty Heineken Silver stands tall against a sunlit backdrop of a modern rooftop party, with shimmering cityscape reflections dancing off its sleek surface, enticing viewers to join the vibrant, refreshing moment.
brief.visual_style: Clean, sleek visuals with a bright silver palette emphasizing clarity and sophistication.
brief.typography_style: Elegant modern sans-serif with a light, airy feel
brief.color_scheme: Heineken's signature green, crisp silver, and cool frosty white
